name: bumpkin-app
description: GitHub App webhook runtime for Bumpkin

BUMPKIN_APP_MODE.description: App mode. Use `shell` to dispatch the existing release workflow without a Bumpkin database.

BUMPKIN_APP_WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: GitHub App webhook secret from the app settings page

BUMPKIN_APP_RELEASE_WORKFLOW_FILE.description: Workflow file the App shell should dispatch for release preview/publish.

BUMPKIN_APP_GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY.description: GitHub App private key PEM content. Paste the full key, preserving newlines or using \n escapes.

BUMPKIN_APP_PROVIDER_TOKEN.description: Optional fallback token for dispatching workflows if GitHub App credentials are not used.

MODELS_TOKEN.description: Model provider token used for merge recommendations

BUMPKIN_MODELS_ENDPOINT.description: OpenAI-compatible model endpoint used by the recommendation runner

BUMPKIN_APP_BUMP_MISMATCH_POLICY.description: How /bump behaves when the requested level differs from the stored recommendation

DATABASE_URL.description: Legacy mode only. Optional Postgres connection string for the older DB-backed control plane.
